title: Ores And You
description: Mod that adds many new ores to the game ! Each has its own armor, tools and unique abilites !
body:
The mod has currently 4 materials that you can make ( or upgrade ) your armor and tools with.

I wont tell you how to get them all but here's a hint for all of them:

Fibrinum: Dirt

Ingrit : Casually mine

Gearin: Lush Caves

Dioryte Alloy: JEI recipe



Ores And You have a unique achievment-based upgrade system where you can track both your exploring and mining part of the mod ( finding templates at scructures and mining for new ores ) 

Every ingot/gem has basic info about the material ( eg. abilites )

Enjoy !



More ores will be added soon !

New mechanics are coming !
